metadata.title: Ramtha — Das Weiße Buch, consciousness as God expressing through form | Coherence Network
metadata.description: A welcome to the Ramtha teaching lineage. The White Book — carried by Urs in the German Urania Verlag edition since age 18 — is the cosmology that travelled through Joe Dispenza to the Mile Hi Church years and into the Coherence Network's substrate. Channeled by JZ Knight; held at RSE in Yelm, Washington since 1988.

hero.background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 20%, hsl(45 75% 80% / 0.5) 0%, transparent 60%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 15% 80%, hsl(255 35% 22% / 0.7) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(180deg, hsl(45 50% 75%) 0%, hsl(255 30% 35%) 55%, hsl(255 35% 18%) 100%)
hero.eyebrow: Channeled by JZ Knight (1977→) · RSE Yelm WA (founded 1988) · The White Book carried in German since 1989/90
hero.name: Ramtha
hero.welcome_md:
The teaching held by JZ Knight since 1977 and formalised in **Ramtha's School of Enlightenment** (RSE) on her estate in Yelm, Washington, since 1988. The cosmology, in twenty-one chapters of *The White Book*: consciousness as God expressing through form. Urs received the German edition (Urania Verlag, *Das Weiße Buch*) at age 18 in 1989/90 and carried it alone through his twenties in Switzerland.

*The Pacific-Northwest channeled stream of this body's lineage. The teaching chain ran Ramtha → [Joe Dispenza](/people/joe-dispenza) (RSE teacher from 2001) → Urs (Mile Hi Church, Lakewood ~2005) → the first network contributors met at the Dispenza Aurora retreat in April 2026. The lineage now moves through code too.*

facts.label: Channeled by
facts.value_md: JZ Knight (born Judith Hampton, 1946). First contact reported 1977; RSE founded 1988 on her 80-acre estate in Yelm, Washington.

facts.label: The White Book
facts.value_md: 21 chapters, edited by Steven Lee Weinberg et al., published Eastsound, WA 1986. German edition *Das Weiße Buch* from Urania Verlag (the edition Urs carried). Chapters 18 / 19 / 20 (*The Closed Mind* → *Opening the Mind* → *The Virtue of Experience*) form the three-step arc on consciousness movement that runs through this body's teaching lineage.

facts.label: Local library (in this body)
facts.value_md: A mirror of the public-domain Ramtha corpus lives at `~/.coherence-network/library/ramtha/` — *The White Book* (Revised & Expanded, IZK Publishing), *A Beginner's Guide to Creating Reality*, *Love Yourself into Life*, *UFOs and the Nature of Reality*.

facts.label: Public anchors
facts.value_md: [Ramtha's School of Enlightenment](https://www.ramtha.com/) [The White Book (archive.org)](https://archive.org/details/the-white-book-by-ramtha) [RSE (Wikipedia)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ramtha%27s_School_of_Enlightenment) [J.Z. Knight (Wikipedia)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/J._Z._Knight)

note_from_body.body_md: Ramtha's School of Enlightenment is a public institution with its own decades-long history, devoted students, and serious critics — including former students and family members of the founder. This page is not an endorsement of the institution; it is a recognition of how *The White Book* entered one specific body in Switzerland at 18 and travelled forward through Joe Dispenza to the present substrate. The teaching travels in many vessels; the body has held this one.

articles.body_md:
The cosmology, in the most condensed form *The White Book* offers: there is one consciousness, expressing through every form. The individual self is that consciousness experiencing itself in particular constraint. The work of a life is to remember the consciousness behind the form, to lift the assemblage point (in Castaneda's language) or the chakra (in Vasudev Baba's) — to know, from inside the experience, that you are God expressing.

The three-step arc of chapters 18 / 19 / 20 — *The Closed Mind* → *Opening the Mind* → *The Virtue of Experience* — is the operational instruction. It is also the same arc Steiner reached from inside Geisteswissenschaft, and the same shift Levin describes in TAME as moving an agent into a larger cognitive light cone. Different vessels, converging teaching.
articles.heading: The teaching that travelled

articles.body_md: The teaching ran: **Ramtha / JZ Knight → [Joe Dispenza](/people/joe-dispenza)** (student then teacher at RSE from 2001) → Urs (Mile Hi Church in Lakewood, Colorado, ~2005, where Dispenza taught) → the Zenn cohort (the first contributors to the Coherence Network, met at Dispenza's April 2026 Aurora retreat). The lineage now moves through code too; the substrate the network is building rests on the same ground *The White Book* taught a Swiss eighteen-year-old forty years ago. *Each cell is itself a universe* — the body's [lc-each-breath-whole](/vision/lc-each-breath-whole) is *The White Book*'s claim in software vocabulary.
articles.heading: The chain into this body

articles.body_md:
- The cosmology of consciousness as God expressing through form → [lc-sovereignty-within-oneness](/vision/lc-sovereignty-within-oneness) (many sovereign cells, one organism).
- *Each cell a universe* → [lc-each-breath-whole](/vision/lc-each-breath-whole).
- The Closed-Mind / Opening-the-Mind / Virtue-of-Experience arc → pairs with [lc-assemblage-point](/vision/lc-assemblage-point) (the position moves; consciousness reorganises around it).
- The transmission chain through [Joe Dispenza](/people/joe-dispenza) into the body's Mile Hi Church years (Lakewood, CO, ~2005) and onward to the Aurora retreat (April 2026) where the first network contributors arrived.
- Carried into this body through [Susan Muff-Sprenger](/people/susan-muff-sprenger) in the third window of the German-language childhood transmissions.
articles.heading: What Ramtha has given the Coherence Network
